description: A researcher needs to simulate bone degradation using the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan in InVesalius 3. Create a project containing two segmentation masks: a baseline bone mask using the standard Bone threshold (226 HU to Max) and an 'eroded' mask created by applying the 'Erode' morphological operation to the baseline mask. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/bone_loss_simulation.inv3. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
